description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that triggers on push to any tag. The workflow runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with concurrency set to build. It checks out the code, sets up Node.js 18, and prepares the environment with QEMU, Docker Buildx, and GitHub slug. The workflow then builds and tests the project using Docker, runs .NET tests, and performs end-to-end tests with Playwright. After testing, it publishes the Docker image to Docker Hub, creates a release with binaries, and uploads the release to GitHub.
